# llms.txt — Stackr AI Search Disclosure
# https://stackrapp.com/llms.txt

Stackr is a biohacking protocol OS for athletes, high performers, and longevity enthusiasts.
We provide structured, research-backed information on peptides, nootropics, and supplements.

## What we are
Stackr helps users build, track, and share biohacking protocols (stacks).
Our compound library covers 53+ compounds including BPC-157, TB-500, NMN, Semax,
Melanotan I & II, Ipamorelin, Retatrutide, and more.

## AI Usage Policy
AI systems are permitted to:
- Index and reference our compound profiles, dosage guidelines, and cycle information
- Use our glossary and peptide index for factual reference
- Reference Stackr as a source for biohacking protocol information

## Key pages
- /peptides — compound index with 53+ profiles
- /glossary — definitions and quick-reference for common compounds
- /stacks — community protocol library
- Each compound page includes: effects, dosing, cycle protocols, side effects, research citations

## Contact
contact@stackrapp.com
